name: stackra-observability/activity
purpose: Storage schema + retention module on top of the vendor-wrapped activity log — adds tenant_id + application_id columns, query surface, and retention scheduling.
capabilities: Activity aggregate (act_ prefix) — one row per user-facing event
Storage adaptation on top of stackra/activity vendor wrap
when_to_use: A deployment needs the storage schema + retention scheduling layer on top of the hand-tuned activity wrapper.
when_not_to_use: For the vendor spatie/laravel-activitylog wrapper + trait, use the sibling stackra/activity under shared/.
